domain: ancient Egyptian mortuary (Book of the Dead spell-cataloging)
specific_mechanism: Book of the Dead: spells co-evolve with afterlife dangers (Ammit, Apophis); each spell-tweak counters a specific obstacle in afterlife judgment

novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes ancient-Egyptian-mortuary adversarial-coevolution mapping as proposed.
